violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the kitchen 2-door reach-in cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
